header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker at 50. While I don't want to cause unnecessary tension, I also don't want to let someone take credit for my work without addressing it. I would likely have a private conversation with the coworker, expressing my feelings and asking them to give me credit where it's due. I wouldn't make a scene or cause a big confrontation, but I also wouldn't just let it go without saying anything.

Therefore, I would place this clue closer to the 'Stay late and meet people' end of the spectrum.
